concept: Players assume the role of a night guard in a horror attraction, tasked with surviving five nights by monitoring security cameras and managing ventilation and audio systems to deter a single animatronic antagonist. Core gameplay involves using a tablet-like interface to switch camera views, seal vents, and play audio cues to lure the animatronic away, while constantly rebooting failing systems to prevent system errors and jump scares.
name: Five Nights at Freddy's 3
